name: Arbuckle Acres Park
description: Arbuckle Acres Park is a place to play pickleball in Brownsburg, IN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Avon Christian Church
description: Avon Christian Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Avon, IN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Avon UMC Church
description: This facility is not open to the general public

name: Brownsburg High School
description: Brownsburg High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brownsburg, IN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Danville Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Danville Athletic Club in Danville, IN! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Ellis Park
description: Ellis Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Danville, IN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are available.

name: Franklin Park
description: Franklin Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Plainfield, IN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at Hendricks Regional Health YMCA in Avon, IN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. name: Scamahorn park

description: Washington Township Park is a place to play pickleball in Avon, IN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water.
